commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The blocking lost-update race and candidate-identity gap have a bounded code-and-test repair that does not require choosing a new product capability.; Needs attention: The patch limits candidate types, but its path-based validation does not guarantee that the validated file is the one subsequently read.; Review finding: [P1] Prevent recovery from overwriting a newer valid store — src/config/sessions/store-loa... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds load-time recovery of an unusable session store from validated backup or stale temporary artifacts and atomically self-heals the primary file.

PR surface: Source +198, Tests +244. Total +442 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The existing corrupt-store symptom is source-reproducible, and the introduced race is deterministic by installing a newer valid primary after candidate selection but before the unconditional recovery rename.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocking lost-update race and candidate-identity gap have a bounded code-and-test repair that does not require choosing a new product capability.
